services.label: What We Offer
services.title: Tour Services
services.subtitle: From VIP private tours to group adventures, we create unforgettable travel experiences across North America.
services.vipDesc: Exclusive one-on-one experiences tailored to your interests. Our guides design a perfect itinerary just for you.
services.groupDesc: Join like-minded travelers on curated group experiences. Perfect for social adventurers seeking shared discoveries.
services.customDesc: Tell us your time and interests — we'll craft a unique route covering hidden gems and iconic landmarks alike.
services.multilingualDesc: Our guides speak Russian, English, Polish, German, French, Spanish, Mandarin, and Japanese fluently. Experience every destination in your preferred language.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: What Travelers Say
testimonials.t1: Our guide made Washington DC come alive! Speaking Russian was a huge plus — we understood every detail of American history like never before.
testimonials.t2: I paid less and got more — direct, honest pricing. The VIP tour of New York was incredible. Our guide took us to spots we never would have found on our own.
testimonials.t3: Booking direct with my guide felt personal and fair. We booked a custom family tour across three cities and the personalized itinerary was beyond our expectations.

howItWorks.label: Simple Process
howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.philosophy: Travel should be human, direct, and authentic.
howItWorks.platformNote: Guides Directly does NOT set prices, manage bookings, take commissions, or act as an agency. We introduce travelers and guides — they work directly together.
howItWorks.tStep1Desc: Tell us your destination, dates, group size, interests, and budget.
howItWorks.tStep2Desc: Qualified local guides in your destination respond directly to you.
howItWorks.tStep3Desc: Review profiles, compare options, and select the right expert for you.
howItWorks.tStep4Desc: Communicate, agree on details, and pay your guide directly — zero platform fees.
howItWorks.gStep1Desc: Submit your guide profile with your specialties, areas, and experience.
howItWorks.gStep2Desc: Our team reviews your application to maintain quality standards.
howItWorks.gStep3Desc: Traveler inquiries matching your areas and specialties reach you directly.
howItWorks.gStep4Desc: Set your own prices. Communicate directly. Keep everything you earn.

whyDirect.label: Why Book Direct?
whyDirect.title: Better in Every Way
whyDirect.gItem2: Direct clients — your clients are yours
whyDirect.gItem5: Equal opportunity exposure for all guides

forGuides.label: For Guides
forGuides.title: Work Directly With Travelers Worldwide
forGuides.subtitle: Keep your earnings. Control your pricing. Choose your clients.
forGuides.costNote: Joining is currently free during launch. Future paid tools will always be optional.

trust.label: Why Trust Us
trust.title: Built on Transparency
trust.coreStatement: Guides Directly is a global connection platform that introduces travelers to professional local guides. We do not act as an agency, do not control pricing, and do not take commissions. Travelers and guides work directly together.
trust.item1Desc: Every guide is manually reviewed before joining the platform.
trust.item2Desc: We never touch tour payments. Guides set their own prices, travelers pay directly.
trust.item3Desc: You speak with your actual guide — not a call center or booking agent.
trust.item4Desc: What you agree with your guide is exactly what you pay. Zero surprises.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Common Questions
faq.a1: No. Guides Directly never charges commissions on tours. Guides keep 100% of what travelers pay them. Our future revenue comes from optional professional tools — never from commissions.
faq.a2: You pay the guide directly — cash, bank transfer, or any method you both agree on. We don't process tour payments.
faq.a3: Yes. Every guide goes through a manual review before approval. Many are licensed, insured, and carry professional certifications.
faq.q4: Will you start charging commissions later?
faq.a4: No. Our model is built specifically to avoid commissions. Our future revenue comes from optional services, not from guide earnings.
faq.a5: No. We are a direct connection platform between travelers and guides. We do not set prices, manage bookings, or act as an agency.
faq.a6: Because we're focused on building a strong global network first. Early participants benefit from priority visibility and early traveler access.

footer.description: A global connection platform introducing travelers to professional local guides. Zero commissions. Direct communication. Authentic experiences worldwide.
footer.rights: Guides Directly / iGuide Tours. All rights reserved.
footer.securityNote: We prioritize your data. Guides Directly utilizes real-time breach monitoring and encrypted connections to ensure that your business and travel details remain private.

about.label: About Us
about.title: Who We Are
about.p1: Guides Directly was created to modernize travel by removing barriers between travelers and local guides. Traditional platforms often limit communication and charge high commissions. Our platform restores direct connection and fair opportunity for both travelers and guides.
about.p2: Founded by Michael Zlotnitsky, who has over 35 years of experience in the tourism industry, iGuide Tours — now part of Guides Directly — emphasizes personalized experiences that showcase the history, culture, and cuisine of each destination.
about.p3: We are launching city-by-city, starting with our pilot destination Washington D.C., followed by structured expansion across North America and then globally.
about.p4: Guides Directly is a global infrastructure platform connecting travelers with local guides through direct communication and zero-commission interaction.
about.funding: The platform is privately funded during launch. Future revenue will come only from optional professional tools and services — never from commissions or hidden traveler fees.

dest.originDesc1: We are working hard to perfect our
dest.originDesc2: model through our rigorous pilot launch in Washington D.C. Through testing every variable in the U.S. capital, we are developing the
dest.quote: D.C. isn't just our first city; it is our laboratory in which we'll prove that travelers prefer direct access — and guides deserve 100% of their earnings.
dest.scalingDesc: After achieving a full success of our D.C. pilot, we'll begin systematically deploying our playbook across North America's most iconic destinations.
dest.globalDesc: Our infrastructure is built for every border. We are currently identifying local leaders to adapt our Launch-City Playbook for international markets.
dest.guideCTADesc: Are you a local expert in a city we haven't reached yet? We provide the platform and the playbook; you provide the expertise. Join the world's only commission-free professional network.
dest.travelerCTADesc: Stop paying 20–30% markups to booking platforms. Connect directly with the people who know the city best. Worldwide expansion is underway — see where we're landing next.

launch.title: Expanding City by City
launch.desc: We launch each destination only after verified guides are onboarded, ensuring quality experiences for every traveler.
launch.phase1Desc: Our first destination. Testing and validating the direct connection blueprint.
launch.phase2Desc: 15+ cities including NYC, Miami, LA, Toronto, and more — guided by our launch playbook.
launch.phase3Desc: International expansion with local leaders in every region adapting the playbook.

platform.label: What This Platform Is
platform.title: A Global Connection Platform
platform.desc: Guides Directly introduces travelers to professional local guides for city tours, ecotourism experiences, cultural exploration, nature adventures, and custom travel. Travelers and guides communicate directly, plan together, and agree on services without intermediaries.
platform.platformRole: The platform only introduces both sides — it does not interfere in pricing, communication, or payments.

monetization.label: Transparency
monetization.title: How We Make Money Without Commissions
monetization.subtitle: Full transparency on our sustainable model — because you deserve to know.
monetization.never1: We don't take commissions from guides
monetization.never2: We don't add markups for travelers
monetization.never4: We don't act as an agency
monetization.coreDesc: The platform only introduces travelers and guides. All communication, agreements, and payments happen directly between them.
monetization.platformOnly: The platform only introduces both sides
monetization.streamsLabel: How We Earn — Optional Services Only
monetization.optionalNote: All tools are optional. Guides can use the platform for free — always.

trustPage.heroDesc: Guides Directly is designed with enterprise-grade security from day one. Security isn't a feature — it's our foundation.
trustPage.heroNote: 🛡 Your files are protected. Every upload is validated, scanned, encrypted, and securely stored.
trustPage.badgesDesc: Five independent layers protecting travelers and guides.
trustPage.badge2Desc: Data secured in transit and storage
trustPage.badge4Desc: Your data is never sold or shared
trustPage.feat1Desc: Your information is protected with modern TLS encryption during transfer and AES-256 at rest in storage.
trustPage.feat2Desc: Guides undergo credential and identity checks before approval. Licenses are reviewed by verification staff.
trustPage.feat3Desc: Every file is scanned by industry-standard antivirus detection before it reaches our storage system.
trustPage.feat4Desc: We never sell your data. Sensitive documents are accessible only to authorized verification staff.
trustPage.uploadDesc: Every uploaded file passes automated multi-layer screening before storage.
trustPage.check1: File type whitelist enforced (JPG, PNG, WEBP, PDF only)
trustPage.check2: File size limits: 5 MB photos · 10 MB documents
trustPage.check3: Filenames randomized — original name never stored
trustPage.check5: Private storage buckets — no public URLs
trustPage.check6: Signed temporary access links with expiry
trustPage.ctaDesc: Every booking is protected by the same enterprise-grade security that powers top travel platforms.

badge.licensedTooltip: This guide's professional license has been verified.
